title: Emojis Pack
description: Improve the look of Minecraft's emojis
body:
Makes the minecraft emojis looks like emojis should. It replaces white outlined emojis with colorful ones

If emojis appears blacks on signs, appy white dye and glow ink on it to make the emojis appear in colors

All emojis designs come from Twemojis and are licensed under CC-BY-4.0
